response.text: Oh. Oh. I came in with empty pockets, still I walked like I owned it. No handouts, no shortcut, just hard nights and a strong grip. Mama said, "Keep your head up," I said, "Watch me go get it." Now the same ones that left me see me turnin' pain to profit. Cold floor, cheap place, bare walls, still I made a way out. Learned how to count my losses, then I flipped 'em to a payout. Every scar on my knuckles got a story, got a lesson. I don't talk, I move heavy, I don't wait for blessings. I was built in the pressure, I was made for the climb. All my doubts in the rearview, now I'm steppin' in time. Hands up, watch me rise, now no fear in my chest. If you knew where I started, you'd know I earned this. Built from dust, built from dust. Watch me turn it all to gold. All, all, all, all. Built from dust, built from dust. I make my own future hold. All, all, all, all. Built from dust, built from dust. Yeah, I rose out the pain. All, all, all, all. Built from dust, built from dust. And now I run my own lane. All, all, all. Had nights when the rent was due and the fridge stayed quiet. Had dreams in a notebook, had to fight just to try it. Now I sign my own name, no middleman, no favor. I don't need your approval, I was born my own savior. They wanted me folded up, wanted me stuck in place. But I learned how to build bricks out of every bad break. Now the circle look smaller 'cause I only keep the real ones. Big plans on my mind now, and they know I ain't the same son. I took hits, I took losses, still I stayed on my mission. Every step got me closer, every bruise was tuition. I was built in the pressure, I was made for the climb. All my doubts in the rearview, now I'm steppin' in time. Hands up, watch me rise, now no fear in my chest. If you knew where I started, you'd know I earned this. Built from dust, built from dust. Watch me turn it all to gold. All, all, all, all. Built from dust, built from dust. I make my own future hold. All, all, all, all. Built from dust, built from dust. Yeah, I rose out the pain. All, all, all, all. Built from dust, built from dust. And now I run my own lane. All, all, all. I don't fold, I don't bend, I just level up again. From the mud to the throne, I been carvin' out my name. One life, one shot, I'ma make that count. If they ask how I did it, tell 'em I turned it out. Built from dust, built from dust. Watch me turn it all to gold. All, all, all, all. Built from dust, built from dust. I make my own future hold. All, all, all, all. Built from dust, built from dust. Yeah, I rose out the pain. All, all, all, all. Built from dust, built from dust. And now I run my own lane. All, all, all.
